$comment: schema-version: 1.1.0 (versioned as a set with the superspecs package; see schemas/README.md)
title: OpenSpec Design AST
description: Parsed AST of an openspec/changes/<id>/design.md file. Validated only when the file is present. Error code prefix: SDD200-SDD299.

title.description: The top-level # <Title> heading text. Empty/missing → SDD200.

context.description: Body of the ## Context section. Optional (may be empty).
